title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Vestian

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Vestian
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
